issues.description: effectText describes a triggered effect with duration '[Your Turn]' but effects[] is empty. DSL must include the trigger, conditions, and actions.
Text contains '[Your Turn]' which indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not empty or 'Permanent'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] When a card is removed from your or your opponent's Life cards, draw 1 card. Then, you cannot draw cards using your own effects during this turn.
